title: Month-End Close: Package Workpapers for Review
description: Automatically compile all your month-end workpapers into a structured, reviewer-ready package.

steps.title: Create a 'Package Workpapers' skill
steps.content: This skill collects all the outputs from the previous steps (reconciliations, AJEs, financial statements, variance commentary) and organizes them into a single workpaper binder with a table of contents and section tabs.

steps.title: Add a review checklist
steps.content: Include a standardized review checklist at the front: all reconciliations tied, all AJEs approved, financial statements balance, variance commentary complete. The reviewer checks each item.

steps.title: Include the close memo
steps.content: The final output includes a signed close memo summarizing: close date, key adjustments made, open items carried forward, and any issues flagged for partner/manager attention.
